#UpSet Plot- Species Shared by Relative Abundance or Presence Absence

##upset plot set themes
```{r}
font_add_google("Reem Kufi", "Reem Kufi")   # <-- REQUIRED
showtext_auto()                             # <-- activates showtext

## ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Reem Kufi", base_size = 12))

theme_update(
  plot.title = element_text(size = 27,
                            face = "bold",
                            hjust = .5,
                            margin = margin(10, 0, 30, 0)),
  plot.caption = element_text(size = 9,
                              color = "grey40",
                              hjust = .5,
                              margin = margin(20, 0, 5, 0)),
  axis.text.y = element_blank(),
  axis.title = element_blank(),
  plot.background = element_rect(fill = "grey88", color = NA),
  panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
  strip.text.y = element_blank(),
  legend.position = "bottom",
  legend.text = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey40"),
  legend.box.margin = margin(t = 30), 
  legend.background = element_rect(color = "grey40", 
                                   size = .3, 
                                   fill = "grey95"),
  legend.key.height = unit(.25, "lines"),
  legend.key.width = unit(2.5, "lines"),
  plot.margin = margin(rep(20, 4))
)

#second-------------------

font_add_google("Chivo", "Chivo")
font_add_google("Passion One", "Passion One")

## ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Chivo"))

theme_update(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, color = "grey20"),
             axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black", face = "bold"),
             axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey45"),
             axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
             axis.ticks.length.x = unit(.4, "lines"),
             panel.grid = element_blank(),
             plot.background = element_rect(fill = "grey60", color = "grey60"))
```

##Upset Plot - by Species and Presence Absence- All Wards in One
```{r eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(sysfonts)
#theme set----------
font_add_google("Chivo", "Chivo")
font_add_google("Passion One", "Passion One")

## ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Chivo"))

theme_update(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, color = "grey20"),
             axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),
             axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey45"),
             axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
             axis.ticks.length.x = unit(.4, "lines"),
             panel.grid = element_blank(),
             plot.background = element_rect(fill = "grey60", color = "grey60"))

font_add_google("Reem Kufi", "Reem Kufi")   # <-- REQUIRED
library(showtext)
showtext_auto()                             # <-- activates showtext

## ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Reem Kufi", base_size = 12))

theme_update(
  plot.title = element_text(size = 27,
                            face = "bold",
                            hjust = .5,
                            margin = margin(10, 0, 30, 0)),
  plot.caption = element_text(size = 9,
                              color = "grey40",
                              hjust = .5,
                              margin = margin(20, 0, 5, 0)),
  axis.text.y = element_blank(),
  axis.title = element_blank(),
  plot.background = element_rect(fill = "grey88", color = NA),
  panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
  strip.text.y = element_blank(),
  legend.position = "bottom",
  legend.text = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey40"),
  legend.box.margin = margin(t = 30), 
  legend.background = element_rect(color = "grey40", 
                                   size = .3, 
                                   fill = "grey95"),
  legend.key.height = unit(.25, "lines"),
  legend.key.width = unit(2.5, "lines"),
  plot.margin = margin(rep(20, 4))
)
#R prep---------------------------------------
## packages
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(ggtext)
library(showtext)
library(sysfonts)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggstatsplot)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(vegan)
library(OTUtable)
library(vegan)
library(MASS)
library(ggtext)
library(ggupset)
library(forcats)

font_add_google("Chivo", "Chivo")
font_add_google("Passion One", "Passion One")

## ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Chivo"))

theme_update(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, color = "grey11"),
             axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),
             axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "white"),
             axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
             axis.ticks.length.x = unit(.4, "lines"),
             panel.grid = element_blank(),
             plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "white"))

#R data -------------------------
# Specify locations to include
locations <- c("FIONA", "SHREK", "OSCAR", "MARIO", "LUIGI")
# Assuming 'metaphlan_output' is your MetaPhlAn data frame
# RPIP taxa
rpip_targets <- c(
  "Achromobacter_denitrificans",
  "Achromobacter_xylosoxidans",
  "Acinetobacter_baumannii",
  "Acinetobacter_lwoffii",
  "Acinetobacter_nosocomialis",
  "Acinetobacter_pittii",
  "Actinomyces_graevenitzii",
  "Actinomyces_israelii",
  "Actinomyces_meyeri",
  "Actinomyces_naeslundii",
  "Actinomyces_odontolyticus",
  "Aeromonas_caviae",
  "Aeromonas_hydrophila",
  "Aeromonas_sobria",
  "Aeromonas_veronii",
  "Aggregatibacter_actinomycetemcomitans",
  "Aggregatibacter_aphrophilus",
  "Arcanobacterium_haemolyticum",
  "Bacillus_anthracis",
  "Bacillus_cereus",
  "Bacillus_thuringiensis",
  "Bacteroides_fragilis",
  "Bartonella_henselae",
  "Bartonella_quintana",
  "Bordetella_bronchiseptica",
  "Bordetella_hinzii",
  "Bordetella_holmesii",
  "Bordetella_parapertussis",
  "Bordetella_pertussis",
  "Brucella_abortus",
  "Brucella_canis",
  "Brucella_melitensis",
  "Brucella_suis",
  "Burkholderia_gladioli",
  "Burkholderia_mallei",
  "Burkholderia_pseudomallei",
  "Burkholderia_thailandensis",
  "Campylobacter_concisus",
  "Capnocytophaga_gingivalis",
  "Capnocytophaga_leadbetteri",
  "Capnocytophaga_sputigena",
  "Cardiobacterium_hominis",
  "Cardiobacterium_valvarum",
  "Chlamydia_pneumoniae",
  "Chlamydia_psittaci",
  "Chlamydia_trachomatis",
  "Citrobacter_freundii",
  "Citrobacter_koseri",
  "Corynebacterium_diphtheriae",
  "Corynebacterium_jeikeium",
  "Corynebacterium_striatum",
  "Corynebacterium_ulcerans",
  "Coxiella_burnetii",
  "Cronobacter_sakazakii",
  "Cutibacterium_propionicum",  
  "Eikenella_corrodens",
  "Elizabethkingia_anophelis",
  "Elizabethkingia_meningoseptica",
  "Enterobacter_cloacae",
  "Enterococcus_faecalis",
  "Enterococcus_faecium",
  "Escherichia_coli",
  "Fusobacterium_necrophorum",
  "Fusobacterium_nucleatum",
  "Gemella_haemolysans",
  "Gemella_morbillorum",
  "Haemophilus_influenzae",
  "Haemophilus_parahaemolyticus",
  "Haemophilus_parainfluenzae",
  "Haemophilus_pittmaniae",
  "Haemophilus_haemolyticus",
  "Klebsiella_aerogenes",
  "Klebsiella_oxytoca",
  "Klebsiella_pneumoniae",
  "Klebsiella_quasipneumoniae",
  "Klebsiella_variicola",
  "Kingella_kingae",
  "Leptotrichia_buccalis",
  "Listeria_monocytogenes",
  "Moraxella_catarrhalis",
  "Moraxella_osloensis",
  "Morganella_morganii",
  "Mycobacterium_tuberculosis_complex",
  "Mycobacterium_avium",
  "Mycoplasma_pneumoniae",
  "Neisseria_flavescens",
  "Neisseria_lactamica",
  "Neisseria_meningitidis",
  "Neisseria_mucosa",
  "Pasteurella_multocida",
  "Proteus_mirabilis",
  "Proteus_vulgaris",
  "Providencia_stuartii",
  "Pseudomonas_aeruginosa",
  "Pseudomonas_fluorescens",
  "Pseudomonas_stutzeri",
  "Ralstonia_pickettii",
  "Raoultella_ornithinolytica",
  "Raoultella_planticola",
  "Salmonella_enterica",
  "Serratia_marcescens",
  "Staphylococcus_aureus",
  "Stenotrophomonas_maltophilia",
  "Streptococcus_agalactiae",
  "Streptococcus_anginosus",
  "Streptococcus_constellatus",
  "Streptococcus_dysgalactiae",
  "Streptococcus_intermedius",
  "Streptococcus_mitis",
  "Streptococcus_pneumoniae",
  "Streptococcus_pyogenes",
  "Treponema_denticola",
  "Ureaplasma_urealyticum",
  "Ureaplasma_parvum",
  "Veillonella_parvula",
  "Yersinia_enterocolitica",
  "Yersinia_pestis"
)

rpip_targets = rpip_pathogen_species_list

df <- centrifuge_merged_df %>%
  filter(str_detect(clade_name, "s__")) %>% 
  mutate(rel_ab = as.numeric(relative_abundance)) %>% 
  filter(Location %in% locations) %>% 
  filter(Species %in% c(rpip_targets))  %>% 

  filter(Type %in% c("Drain", "Endcap", "H_WW")) %>% 
  mutate(
    Month = format(as.Date(Date), "%m-%Y")
  )

# Count detects per Species × Type
# Count detects per Species × Type
df_detects <- df %>%

  #filter out reads with rel_ab >0.0001
  filter(rel_ab>0.0005) %>% 

  group_by(Species, SampleID) %>% 
  mutate(sum_rel_ab = sum(rel_ab,na.rm = TRUE)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 

  dplyr::select(Species,Type,Location,SampleID,sum_rel_ab) %>% distinct() %>%

  mutate(detect = ifelse(sum_rel_ab>0,1,0)) %>% 

  group_by(Species, Type) %>%
  summarise(
    n_detects_type = sum(detect, na.rm = TRUE),   # how many samples detected?
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 

  filter(n_detects_type >0)

# Total detects per species (for ordering)
detect_order <- df_detects %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarise(n_detects = sum(n_detects_type)
         #, .groups = "drop"
         ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_detects))

# compute detection + average rel_ab
df_ranks_type <- df_detects %>%
  left_join(detect_order, by = "Species") %>%

mutate(ID = rank(-n_detects_type, ties.method = "first")) %>%

  mutate(
    Species = factor(
      Species,
      levels = unique(Species[order(n_detects, -n_detects_type)])
    )
  ) %>% 

  mutate(
    TypeLabel = case_when(
      Type == "H_WW" ~ "Hospital Wastewater",
      Type == "Endcap" ~ "Sewer Biofilm",
      Type == "Drain" ~ "Sink Biofilm",
      .default = Type
    ),
    TypeLabel = factor(TypeLabel, 
                       levels = c("Hospital Wastewater", 
                                  "Sewer Biofilm", 
                                  "Sink Biofilm")),
    type_num = as.numeric(TypeLabel)
  ) %>% 

  mutate(
    Species_label = Species %>%
      str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%        # remove underscores
      paste0("*", ., "*"),                 # keep italics
    Species_label = fct_reorder(Species_label, n_detects, .desc = FALSE)
  )

species_list = df_ranks_type %>% dplyr::select(Species_label) %>% distinct() %>% pull()

#Plot-------------

max_detect <- max(df_ranks_type$n_detects)

# candidate step
raw_step <- max_detect / 4

# function to snap to nice values (2, 5, 10, etc.)
nice_step <- function(x) {
  base <- 10^floor(log10(x))
  if (x/base <= 2) return(2 * base)
  if (x/base <= 5) return(5 * base)
  return(10 * base)
}

break_step <- 25

bars <- 
  df_ranks_type %>% 
  ggplot(aes(Species_label, -n_detects_type)) +
    geom_col(aes(fill = TypeLabel),
             size = .5,
             width = 1.02) +
    coord_flip(clip = "off") +
    scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
scale_y_continuous(
          expand = c(.02, .02),
          limits = c(
            -max_detect - max_detect/4,
            0
          ),
          breaks = seq(
            -ceiling(max_detect / break_step) * break_step,
            0,
            by = break_step
          ),
          labels = function(x) abs(as.integer(x)),
          position = "right"
        )+
    #                       #guide = F
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#6d7ecd", "#9fdeca", "#c86c69"))+
    theme(axis.text.y.right = element_markdown(hjust = .5,size = 8),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9),
          axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black"),
          axis.ticks.length = unit(0.5, "pt"),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
          legend.position = "left",
          legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
          plot.margin = margin(5, 0, 5, 5)) +
    labs(x = NULL, 
         fill = "",
         y = "Number of detections")

dots <- df_ranks_type %>% 

  ggplot(aes(Species_label, type_num, group = Species_label)) +
    geom_point(aes(Species_label, 1), color = "white", size = 2,show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_point(aes(Species_label, 2), color = "white", size = 2,show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_point(aes(Species_label, 3), color = "white", size = 2,show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_segment(aes(x = Species_label, xend = Species_label, 
                     y = 1, yend = 3), 
                 color = "white",
                 size = .3) +
    geom_line(color = "black",
              size = .9) +
    geom_point(aes(fill = TypeLabel, size = n_detects_type), 
               show.legend = FALSE,
               shape = 21, 
               color = "black", 
               stroke = 1.2) +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(.5, 7.3),
                       breaks = 1:3,
                       labels = c("Hospital Wastewater", 
                                  "Sewer Biofilm", 
                                  "Sink Biofilm"), 
                       position = "right") +
    scale_size(range = c(0.5, 3.5), guide = F) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#6d7ecd", "#9fdeca", "#c86c69"))+
    theme(axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", 
                                     hjust = .1, vjust = 0, angle = 35),
          axis.text.y = element_blank(),
          plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 0),
          plot.caption = element_text(face = "bold", color = "grey30", 
                                      size = 12, margin = margin(t = 15))) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL,
         caption = "")

plot = bars + dots + plot_layout(widths = c(1, .5))

showtext_opts(dpi = 300) # Synchronize showtext with ggsave

ggsave(path = "Biofilm Project Figures",file="Centrifuger-Upset Plot Detections per Top Species.png", plot=plot, width=10, height= 12,dpi = 400)
ggsave(path = "Biofilm Project Figures",file="Centrifuger UpSet plot of pathogens detected by Species.svg", plot=plot, width=10, height=13,dpi = 400)

print(plot)

```


#FUNCTIONS
```{r}

remotes::install_github("pmartinezarbizu/pairwiseAdonis/pairwiseAdonis")

pairwise.adonis <- function(x,factors, sim.method = 'bray', p.adjust.m ='bonferroni')
{
  library(vegan)
  co = combn(unique(factors),2)
  pairs = c()
  F.Model =c()
  R2 = c()
  p.value = c()
  for(elem in 1:ncol(co)){
    ad = adonis(x[factors %in% c(co[1,elem],co[2,elem]),] ~ factors[factors %in% c(co[1,elem],co[2,elem])] , method =sim.method);
    pairs = c(pairs,paste(co[1,elem],'vs',co[2,elem]));
    F.Model =c(F.Model,ad$aov.tab[1,4]);
    R2 = c(R2,ad$aov.tab[1,5]);
    p.value = c(p.value,ad$aov.tab[1,6])
  }
  p.adjusted = p.adjust(p.value,method=p.adjust.m)
  pairw.res = data.frame(pairs,F.Model,R2,p.value,p.adjusted)
  return(pairw.res)
}

#updated adonis2 function

pairwise.adonis2 <- function(x, factors, sim.method = 'bray', p.adjust.m = 'bonferroni') {
  library(vegan)

  co <- combn(unique(factors), 2) # all pair combinations
  pairs <- c()
  F.Model <- c()
  R2 <- c()
  p.value <- c()

  for (elem in 1:ncol(co)) {
    # Subset the data & factor
    sel <- factors %in% c(co[1, elem], co[2, elem])

    # Skip if any group has < 2 samples
    if (min(table(factors[sel])) < 2) {
      next
    }

    ad <- adonis2(
      x[sel, ] ~ factors[sel],
      method = sim.method
    )

    pairs     <- c(pairs, paste(co[1, elem], 'vs', co[2, elem]))
    F.Model   <- c(F.Model, ad$F[1])
    R2        <- c(R2, ad$R2[1])
    p.value   <- c(p.value, ad$`Pr(>F)`[1])
  }

  p.adjusted <- p.adjust(p.value, method = p.adjust.m)
  pairw.res  <- data.frame(pairs, F.Model, R2, p.value, p.adjusted)

  return(pairw.res)
}

```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# Reset global theme and font
theme_set(theme_grey(base_family = "", base_size = 11))

theme_update(
  axis.text.x        = element_text(),
  axis.text.y        = element_text(),
  axis.ticks.x       = element_line(),
  axis.ticks.y       = element_line(),
  axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.15, "lines"),
  panel.grid         = element_line(),
  plot.background    = element_rect()
)

# Reset geom defaults that may have inherited "Chivo"
update_geom_defaults("text",  list(family = ""))
update_geom_defaults("label", list(family = ""))

showtext::showtext_auto(FALSE)

```

#Load CSVs
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
#load metaphlan_df
sylph_df <- read.table(
  "Input Data/all_samples_sylphmpa.tsv",
  header = TRUE,
  sep = "\t",
  quote = "",
  fill = TRUE
) %>% 
  # split clade_name into rank columns
  separate(
    clade_name,
    into = c("Domain", "Phylum", "Class", "Order", "Family", "Genus", "Species"),
    sep = "\\|",
    fill = "right",
    remove = FALSE
  ) %>%
  # remove prefixes (d__, p__, c__, o__, f__, g__, s__)
  mutate(across(
    c(Domain, Phylum, Class, Order, Family, Genus, Species),
    ~str_replace(.x, "^[a-z]__", "")
  )) %>% 

  dplyr::rename("SampleID" = "sample")

```

#Load in Metadata
```{r}
metadata_df <- read.csv("Input Data/metadata_Gi_AD.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%

    # Remove leading numbers and dot from Location
  mutate(Location = sub("^\\d+\\.", "", Location)) %>%
  # Replace 'Sept' anywhere in the string with 'Sep'
  mutate(Date = sub("Sept", "Sep", Date)) %>%
  # Remove leading numbers and underscore
  mutate(Date = sub("^\\d+_", "", Date)) %>%
  # Add year
  mutate(date_clean = paste0(Date, "_2024")) %>%
  # Parse into Date
  mutate(Date = as.Date(date_clean, format = "%b%d_%Y")) %>%

  dplyr::select(-LocationMonth, -LocationType,-date_clean) %>%
  dplyr::rename("SampleID" = "Sample_id")

```

#Merge data
```{r}

# Merge datasets based on the 'Sample_ID' column
sylph_merged_df <- full_join(sylph_df, metadata_df, by = 'SampleID') %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  ungroup() 

```

```{r}
"Staphylococcus_aureus","Stenotrophomonas_maltophilia","Streptococcus_agalactiae",
"Streptococcus_anginosus","Streptococcus_constellatus","Streptococcus_dysgalactiae",
"Streptococcus_intermedius","Streptococcus_mitis","Streptococcus_pneumoniae",
"Streptococcus_pyogenes","Treponema_denticola","Ureaplasma_urealyticum",
"Ureaplasma_parvum","Veillonella_parvula","Yersinia_enterocolitica","Yersinia_pestis"
)

#print differences between old and new lists:
# Clean function to remove parentheses and extra spaces for better matching
clean_list <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub(" \\(.*\\)", "", x) # Remove everything in parentheses
  x <- gsub("/.*", "", x)       # Handle the Cryptococcus slash
  trimws(tolower(x))            # Lowercase and trim whitespace
}

# Find differences
only_in_A <- rpip_pathogen_species_list_illumina_terms_new_version[!(clean_list(rpip_pathogen_species_list_illumina_terms_new_version) %in% clean_list(rpip_pathogen_species_list_sylph_nomenclature_old_version))]
only_in_B <- rpip_pathogen_species_list_sylph_nomenclature_old_version[!(clean_list(rpip_pathogen_species_list_sylph_nomenclature_old_version) %in% clean_list(rpip_pathogen_species_list_illumina_terms_new_version))]

print(only_in_A)
print(only_in_B)

#create pathogen species list
rpip_pathogen_species_list= rpip_pathogen_species_list_illumina_terms_new_version

taxa_detected = sylph_merged_df %>% dplyr::distinct(Species) %>% pull(Species)

#taxa_detected[1:999]
#taxa_detected[1000:1999]
```

#UpSet Plot- Species Shared by Relative Abundance or Presence Absence

##upset plot set themes
```{r}
font_add_google("Reem Kufi", "Reem Kufi")   # <-- REQUIRED
showtext_auto()                             # <-- activates showtext

## ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Reem Kufi", base_size = 12))

theme_update(
  plot.title = element_text(size = 27,
                            face = "bold",
                            hjust = .5,
                            margin = margin(10, 0, 30, 0)),
  plot.caption = element_text(size = 9,
                              color = "grey40",
                              hjust = .5,
                              margin = margin(20, 0, 5, 0)),
  axis.text.y = element_blank(),
  axis.title = element_blank(),
  plot.background = element_rect(fill = "grey88", color = NA),
  panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
  strip.text.y = element_blank(),
  legend.position = "bottom",
  legend.text = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey40"),
  legend.box.margin = margin(t = 30), 
  legend.background = element_rect(color = "grey40", 
                                   size = .3, 
                                   fill = "grey95"),
  legend.key.height = unit(.25, "lines"),
  legend.key.width = unit(2.5, "lines"),
  plot.margin = margin(rep(20, 4))
)

#second-------------------

font_add_google("Chivo", "Chivo")
font_add_google("Passion One", "Passion One")

## ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Chivo"))

theme_update(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, color = "grey20"),
             axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black", face = "bold"),
             axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey45"),
             axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
             axis.ticks.length.x = unit(.4, "lines"),
             panel.grid = element_blank(),
             plot.background = element_rect(fill = "grey60", color = "grey60"))
```

##Upset Plot - by Species and Presence Absence- All Wards in One
```{r eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(sysfonts)
#theme set----------
font_add_google("Chivo", "Chivo")
font_add_google("Passion One", "Passion One")

## ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Chivo"))

theme_update(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, color = "grey20"),
             axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black", face = "bold"),
             axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey45"),
             axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
             axis.ticks.length.x = unit(.4, "lines"),
             panel.grid = element_blank(),
             plot.background = element_rect(fill = "grey60", color = "grey60"))

font_add_google("Reem Kufi", "Reem Kufi")   # <-- REQUIRED
library(showtext)
showtext_auto()                             # <-- activates showtext

## ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Reem Kufi", base_size = 12))

theme_update(
  plot.title = element_text(size = 27,
                            face = "bold",
                            hjust = .5,
                            margin = margin(10, 0, 30, 0)),
  plot.caption = element_text(size = 9,
                              color = "grey40",
                              hjust = .5,
                              margin = margin(20, 0, 5, 0)),
  axis.text.y = element_blank(),
  axis.title = element_blank(),
  plot.background = element_rect(fill = "grey88", color = NA),
  panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
  strip.text.y = element_blank(),
  legend.position = "bottom",
  legend.text = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey40"),
  legend.box.margin = margin(t = 30), 
  legend.background = element_rect(color = "grey40", 
                                   size = .3, 
                                   fill = "grey95"),
  legend.key.height = unit(.25, "lines"),
  legend.key.width = unit(2.5, "lines"),
  plot.margin = margin(rep(20, 4))
)
#R prep---------------------------------------
## packages
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(ggtext)
library(showtext)
library(sysfonts)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggstatsplot)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(vegan)
library(OTUtable)
library(vegan)
library(MASS)
library(ggtext)
library(ggupset)
library(forcats)

font_add_google("Chivo", "Chivo")
font_add_google("Passion One", "Passion One")

## ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Chivo"))

theme_update(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, color = "grey11"),
             axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black", face = "bold"),
             axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "white"),
             axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
             axis.ticks.length.x = unit(.4, "lines"),
             panel.grid = element_blank(),
             plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "white"))

#R data -------------------------
# Specify locations to include
locations <- c("FIONA", "SHREK", "OSCAR", "MARIO", "LUIGI")
# Assuming 'metaphlan_output' is your MetaPhlAn data frame
# RPIP taxa
rpip_targets <-  rpip_pathogen_species_list

df <- sylph_merged_df %>%
  filter(str_detect(clade_name, "s__")) %>% 
  mutate(rel_ab = as.numeric(relative_abundance)) %>% 
  filter(Location %in% locations) %>% 
  filter(Species %in% c(rpip_targets))  %>% 

  filter(Type %in% c("Drain", "Endcap", "H_WW")) %>% 
  mutate(
    Month = format(as.Date(Date), "%m-%Y")
  )

# Count detects per Species × Type
df_detects <- df %>%
  mutate(detect = rel_ab > 0) %>%
  group_by(Species, Type) %>%
  summarise(
    n_detects_type = sum(detect, na.rm = TRUE),   # how many samples detected?
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Total detects per species (for ordering)
detect_order <- df_detects %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarise(n_detects = sum(n_detects_type)
         #, .groups = "drop"
         ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_detects))

# compute detection + average rel_ab
df_ranks_type <- df_detects %>%
  left_join(detect_order, by = "Species") %>%

mutate(ID = rank(-n_detects_type, ties.method = "first")) %>%

  mutate(
    Species = factor(
      Species,
      levels = unique(Species[order(n_detects, -n_detects_type)])
    )
  ) %>% 

  mutate(
    TypeLabel = case_when(
      Type == "H_WW" ~ "Hospital Wastewater",
      Type == "Endcap" ~ "Sewer Biofilm",
      Type == "Drain" ~ "Sink Biofilm",
      .default = Type
    ),
    TypeLabel = factor(TypeLabel, 
                       levels = c("Hospital Wastewater", 
                                  "Sewer Biofilm", 
                                  "Sink Biofilm")),
    type_num = as.numeric(TypeLabel)
  ) %>% 

  mutate(
    Species_label = paste0("*", Species, "*"),
    Species_label = fct_reorder(Species_label, n_detects, .desc = FALSE)
  )

species_list = df_ranks_type %>% dplyr::select(Species_label) %>% distinct() %>% pull()

#Plot-------------

max_detect <- max(df_ranks_type$n_detects)

# candidate step
raw_step <- max_detect / 4

# function to snap to nice values (2, 5, 10, etc.)
nice_step <- function(x) {
  base <- 10^floor(log10(x))
  if (x/base <= 2) return(2 * base)
  if (x/base <= 5) return(5 * base)
  return(10 * base)
}

break_step <- 25

bars <- 
  df_ranks_type %>% 
  ggplot(aes(Species_label, -n_detects_type)) +
    geom_col(aes(fill = TypeLabel),
             size = .5,
             width = 1.02) +
    coord_flip(clip = "off") +
    scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
    scale_y_continuous(
          expand = c(.02, .02),
          limits = c(
            -max_detect - max_detect/4,
            0
          ),
          breaks = seq(
            -ceiling(max_detect / break_step) * break_step,
            0,
            by = break_step
          ),
          labels = function(x) abs(as.integer(x)),
          position = "right"
        )+
    #                       #guide = F
   scale_fill_manual(values = c("#6d7ecd", "#9fdeca", "#c86c69"))+
    theme(axis.text.y.right = element_markdown(hjust = .5,size = 12),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 7),
           axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black"),
          axis.ticks.length = unit(0.5, "pt"),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 12,face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "left",
          legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
          plot.margin = margin(5, 0, 5, 5)) +
    labs(x = NULL, 
         fill = "",
         y = "Number of detections")

dots <- df_ranks_type %>% 

  ggplot(aes(Species_label, type_num, group = Species_label)) +
    geom_point(aes(Species_label, 1), color = "white", size = 2,show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_point(aes(Species_label, 2), color = "white", size = 2,show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_point(aes(Species_label, 3), color = "white", size = 2,show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_segment(aes(x = Species_label, xend = Species_label, 
                     y = 1, yend = 3), 
                 color = "white",
                 size = .3) +
    geom_line(color = "black",
              size = .9) +
    geom_point(aes(fill = TypeLabel, size = n_detects_type), 
               show.legend = FALSE,
               shape = 21, 
               color = "black", 
               stroke = 1.2) +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(.5, 7.3),
                       breaks = 1:3,
                       labels = c("Hospital Wastewater", 
                                  "Sewer Biofilm", 
                                  "Sink Biofilm"), 
                       position = "right") +
    scale_size(range = c(2, 5.5), guide = F) +
   scale_fill_manual(values = c("#6d7ecd", "#9fdeca", "#c86c69"))+
    theme(axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", 
                                     hjust = .1, vjust = 0, angle = 35),
          axis.text.y = element_blank(),
          plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 0),
          plot.caption = element_text(face = "bold", color = "grey30", 
                                      size = 12, margin = margin(t = 15))) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL,
         caption = "")

plot = bars + dots + plot_layout(widths = c(1, .50))

showtext_opts(dpi = 300) # Synchronize showtext with ggsave

ggsave(path = "Biofilm Project Figures",file="Sylph-Upset Plot Detections per Top Species.png", plot=plot, width=10, height= 5.5,dpi = 400)
ggsave(path = "Biofilm Project Figures",file="Sylph UpSet plot of pathogens detected by Species.svg", plot=plot, width=10, height=5.5)

print(plot)

```

```{r}

colors = c("red",  "blue",  "green", "purple", "brown", "gold1", "orange", "hotpink", "black", "seagreen", "lightblue", "pink", "goldenrod4")

colors = c("#9FB498", "#8488AC","#BA6646","#C8DFEA","#565656","#865856","#E8DCDD","#F8E5DC","#E8DCDC","#B99796","black","seagreen")

resistome_colors = c("#8488AC", "#9FB498", "#BA6646", "#565656", "#865856", "#B99796", "#F8E5DC")

posterCol1=  "#8488AC"
posterCol2 = "#9FB498"
posterCol3 = "#BA6646"
posterCol4 = "#565656"
posterCol5 = "#865856"
posterCol6 = "#B99796"
posterCol7 = "#F8E5DC"

viridisCol1 = "#79307D"
viridisCol2 = "#417C8C"

colors = c( "#417C8C","#417C8C","#417C8C","#417C8C","#E57262","#79307D","#79307D","#79307D")

colors = c( "#8488AC","#BA6646","#9FB498")

fortyfive_pal = c("#a0cb6b","#8368cb","#c86c69","#cdd3e5","#dab594","#d692d1",
               "#7495c3","#9fdeca","#e2e8c3","#d8a4af","#71bed2","#bca9dd",
               "#8bb598","#e5cbd4","#6d7ecd","#e4d5ca","#a8dfa5","#a0bada",
               "#cbca6f","#c6926f","#cce7e6","#81a4b2","#ca69c3","#76bd75",
               "#d37dae","#abb684","#6ecda4","#a88bbb","#8cbbb6","#d18191",
               "#c1d8c2","#dac4e6","#e0adce","#a96dca","#e2bdb6","#aacedd",
               "#9992d9","#e0d0ab","#a2abdf","#b88b9e","#b4a382","#dba294",
               "#c9dd9b","#c8b67c","#b9847b")

poster_colors = c("#dc9298","#a51c2f","#3d3d3d","#f3e3e5","#417c8c","#e57262","#915493")

poster_colors = c("#dc9298","#a51c2f","#3d3d3d","#f3e3e5","#417c8c","#e57262","#915493")

poster_colors = c("#ce2e2d","#c00300","#88b8c5","#dd9298","#ab74a8","#fc3b3b","#a61d30","#eededf","#dc6c64","#467d91")

```

#FUNCTIONS
```{r}

remotes::install_github("pmartinezarbizu/pairwiseAdonis/pairwiseAdonis")

pairwise.adonis <- function(x,factors, sim.method = 'bray', p.adjust.m ='bonferroni')
{
  library(vegan)
  co = combn(unique(factors),2)
  pairs = c()
  F.Model =c()
  R2 = c()
  p.value = c()
  for(elem in 1:ncol(co)){
    ad = adonis(x[factors %in% c(co[1,elem],co[2,elem]),] ~ factors[factors %in% c(co[1,elem],co[2,elem])] , method =sim.method);
    pairs = c(pairs,paste(co[1,elem],'vs',co[2,elem]));
    F.Model =c(F.Model,ad$aov.tab[1,4]);
    R2 = c(R2,ad$aov.tab[1,5]);
    p.value = c(p.value,ad$aov.tab[1,6])
  }
  p.adjusted = p.adjust(p.value,method=p.adjust.m)
  pairw.res = data.frame(pairs,F.Model,R2,p.value,p.adjusted)
  return(pairw.res)
}

#updated adonis2 function

pairwise.adonis2 <- function(x, factors, sim.method = 'bray', p.adjust.m = 'bonferroni') {
  library(vegan)

  co <- combn(unique(factors), 2) # all pair combinations
  pairs <- c()
  F.Model <- c()
  R2 <- c()
  p.value <- c()

  for (elem in 1:ncol(co)) {
    # Subset the data & factor
    sel <- factors %in% c(co[1, elem], co[2, elem])

    # Skip if any group has < 2 samples
    if (min(table(factors[sel])) < 2) {
      next
    }

    ad <- adonis2(
      x[sel, ] ~ factors[sel],
      method = sim.method
    )

    pairs     <- c(pairs, paste(co[1, elem], 'vs', co[2, elem]))
    F.Model   <- c(F.Model, ad$F[1])
    R2        <- c(R2, ad$R2[1])
    p.value   <- c(p.value, ad$`Pr(>F)`[1])
  }

  p.adjusted <- p.adjust(p.value, method = p.adjust.m)
  pairw.res  <- data.frame(pairs, F.Model, R2, p.value, p.adjusted)

  return(pairw.res)
}

```

#SET THEMES
```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# Reset global theme and font
theme_set(theme_grey(base_family = "", base_size = 11))

theme_update(
  axis.text.x        = element_text(),
  axis.text.y        = element_text(),
  axis.ticks.x       = element_line(),
  axis.ticks.y       = element_line(),
  axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.15, "lines"),
  panel.grid         = element_line(),
  plot.background    = element_rect()
)

# Reset geom defaults that may have inherited "Chivo"
update_geom_defaults("text",  list(family = ""))
update_geom_defaults("label", list(family = ""))

showtext::showtext_auto(FALSE)

```

#Load CSVs
```{r}

#load metaphlan_df
metaphlan_df <- read.table(
  "Input Data/combined_profiles_clean.tsv",
  header = FALSE,
  sep = "\t",
  quote = "",
  fill = TRUE
)

#   "Input Data/combined_profiles_fixed.tsv",

#double check additional species column is right
colnames(metaphlan_df) <- c("SampleID", "clade_name", "NCBI_tax_id", "relative_abundance","additional_species")

#get rid of additional species column
metaphlan_df = metaphlan_df %>% dplyr::select(-additional_species)

#clean metaphlan dataframe so there are columns for kingdom, phylum, class, family, order, genus, species
# Split clade_name by "|", each level goes into a separate column
metaphlan_df_clean <- metaphlan_df %>%
  separate(
    col = clade_name,
    into = c("Kingdom", "Phylum", "Class", "Order", "Family", "Genus", "Species"),
    sep = "\\|",
    fill = "right",     # Fill missing levels with NA
    remove = FALSE      # Keep original clade_name column
  )

# Remove taxonomic prefixes like "k__", "p__", etc.
metaphlan_df_clean <- metaphlan_df_clean %>%
  mutate(across(
    c(Kingdom, Phylum, Class, Order, Family, Genus, Species),
    ~str_replace(., "^[a-z]__", "")  # Remove the prefix
  ))

```

#Load in Metadata
```{r}
metadata_df <- read.csv("Input Data/metadata_Gi_AD.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%

    # Remove leading numbers and dot from Location
  mutate(Location = sub("^\\d+\\.", "", Location)) %>%
  # Replace 'Sept' anywhere in the string with 'Sep'
  mutate(Date = sub("Sept", "Sep", Date)) %>%
  # Remove leading numbers and underscore
  mutate(Date = sub("^\\d+_", "", Date)) %>%
  # Add year
  mutate(date_clean = paste0(Date, "_2024")) %>%
  # Parse into Date
  mutate(Date = as.Date(date_clean, format = "%b%d_%Y")) %>%

  dplyr::select(-LocationMonth, -LocationType,-date_clean) %>%
  dplyr::rename("SampleID" = "Sample_id")

```

#Merge data
```{r}

# Merge datasets based on the 'Sample_ID' column
metaphlan_merged_df <- full_join(metaphlan_df_clean, metadata_df, by = 'SampleID') %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  ungroup() 

```

#Count Pathogens and then Calculate percentage of species that are RPIP vs not
```{r}
to_centrifuge_binomial <- function(x) {
  # Convert only if it looks like Genus species (species starts lowercase OR is "sp.")
  is_binomial <- grepl("^[A-Z][a-z0-9.-]+\\s+(sp\\.|[a-z][a-z0-9.-]+)\\b", x)
  ifelse(is_binomial, sub("\\s+", "_", x, perl = TRUE), x)
}

to_centrifuge_first_space <- function(x) {
  sub("^([^ ]+)\\s+([^ ]+)", "\\1_\\2", x)
}

#replace with centrifuge style:

# ---- RPIP lists ----
rpip_pathogen_species_list_illumina_terms_new_version_metaphlan <-
  to_centrifuge_binomial(rpip_pathogen_species_list_illumina_terms_new_version)

rpip_pathogen_species_list_illumina_terms_new_version_kraken_nomenclature_metaphlan <-
  to_centrifuge_binomial(rpip_pathogen_species_list_illumina_terms_new_version_kraken_nomenclature)

rpip_pathogen_species_list_illumina_terms_old_version_metaphlan <-
  to_centrifuge_binomial(rpip_pathogen_species_list_illumina_terms_old_version)

rpip_pathogen_species_list_kraken_nomenclature_old_version_metaphlan <-
  to_centrifuge_binomial(rpip_pathogen_species_list_kraken_nomenclature_old_version)

#print differences between old and new lists:
# Clean function to remove parentheses and extra spaces for better matching
clean_list <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub(" \\(.*\\)", "", x) # Remove everything in parentheses
  x <- gsub("/.*", "", x)       # Handle the Cryptococcus slash
  trimws(tolower(x))            # Lowercase and trim whitespace
}

# Find differences
only_in_A <- rpip_pathogen_species_list_illumina_terms_new_version_metaphlan[!(clean_list(rpip_pathogen_species_list_illumina_terms_new_version_metaphlan) %in% clean_list(rpip_pathogen_species_list_illumina_terms_old_version_metaphlan))]
only_in_B <- rpip_pathogen_species_list_illumina_terms_old_version_metaphlan[!(clean_list(rpip_pathogen_species_list_illumina_terms_old_version_metaphlan) %in% clean_list(rpip_pathogen_species_list_illumina_terms_new_version_metaphlan))]

print(only_in_A)
print(only_in_B)

#create pathogen species list
rpip_pathogen_species_list= rpip_pathogen_species_list_kraken_nomenclature_old_version_metaphlan

#create final pathogen species list plus notable others: Clostridium perfrigens, Campy coli 
rpip_pathogen_species_list= c(rpip_pathogen_species_list,"Clostridium_perfringens",
  "Campylobacter_coli",
  "Citrobacter_freundii_complex",
  "Naegleria_fowleri",
  "Mycobacterium_avium",
  "Mycobacterium_avium_complex_(MAC)",
  "Pseudomonas_aeruginosa_group",
  "Stenotrophomonas_maltophilia_group",
  "Mycobacterium_tuberculosis",
  "Enterobacter_cloacae",
  "Citrobacter_freundii")

```
#UpSet Plot- Species Shared by Relative Abundance or Presence Absence

##upset plot set themes
```{r}
font_add_google("Reem Kufi", "Reem Kufi")   # <-- REQUIRED
showtext_auto()                             # <-- activates showtext

## ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Reem Kufi", base_size = 12))

theme_update(
  plot.title = element_text(size = 27,
                            face = "bold",
                            hjust = .5,
                            margin = margin(10, 0, 30, 0)),
  plot.caption = element_text(size = 9,
                              color = "grey40",
                              hjust = .5,
                              margin = margin(20, 0, 5, 0)),
  axis.text.y = element_blank(),
  axis.title = element_blank(),
  plot.background = element_rect(fill = "grey88", color = NA),
  panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
  strip.text.y = element_blank(),
  legend.position = "bottom",
  legend.text = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey40"),
  legend.box.margin = margin(t = 30), 
  legend.background = element_rect(color = "grey40", 
                                   size = .3, 
                                   fill = "grey95"),
  legend.key.height = unit(.25, "lines"),
  legend.key.width = unit(2.5, "lines"),
  plot.margin = margin(rep(20, 4))
)

#second-------------------

font_add_google("Chivo", "Chivo")
font_add_google("Passion One", "Passion One")

## ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Chivo"))

theme_update(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, color = "grey20"),
             axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black", face = "bold"),
             axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey45"),
             axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
             axis.ticks.length.x = unit(.4, "lines"),
             panel.grid = element_blank(),
             plot.background = element_rect(fill = "grey60", color = "grey60"))
```

##Upset Plot - by Species and Presence Absence- All Wards in One
```{r eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
#theme set----------
font_add_google("Chivo", "Chivo")
font_add_google("Passion One", "Passion One")

## ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Chivo"))

theme_update(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, color = "grey20"),
             axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black", face = "bold"),
             axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "grey45"),
             axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
             axis.ticks.length.x = unit(.4, "lines"),
             panel.grid = element_blank(),
             plot.background = element_rect(fill = "grey60", color = "grey60"))

font_add_google("Reem Kufi", "Reem Kufi")   # <-- REQUIRED
showtext_auto()                             # <-- activates showtext

## ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Reem Kufi", base_size = 12))

theme_update(
  plot.title = element_text(size = 27,
                            face = "bold",
                            hjust = .5,
                            margin = margin(10, 0, 30, 0)),
  plot.caption = element_text(size = 9,
                              color = "grey40",
                              hjust = .5,
                              margin = margin(20, 0, 5, 0)),
  axis.text.y = element_blank(),
  axis.title = element_blank(),
  plot.background = element_rect(fill = "grey88", color = NA),
  panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
  strip.text.y = element_blank(),
  legend.position = "bottom",
  legend.text = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey40"),
  legend.box.margin = margin(t = 30), 
  legend.background = element_rect(color = "grey40", 
                                   size = .3, 
                                   fill = "grey95"),
  legend.key.height = unit(.25, "lines"),
  legend.key.width = unit(2.5, "lines"),
  plot.margin = margin(rep(20, 4))
)
#R prep---------------------------------------
## packages
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(ggtext)
library(showtext)
library(sysfonts)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggstatsplot)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(vegan)
library(OTUtable)
library(vegan)
library(MASS)
library(ggtext)
library(ggupset)
library(forcats)

font_add_google("Chivo", "Chivo")
font_add_google("Passion One", "Passion One")

## ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Chivo"))

theme_update(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, color = "grey11"),
             axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black", face = "bold"),
             axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "white"),
             axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
             axis.ticks.length.x = unit(.4, "lines"),
             panel.grid = element_blank(),
             plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "white"))

#R data -------------------------
# Specify locations to include
locations <- c("FIONA", "SHREK", "OSCAR", "MARIO", "LUIGI")
# Assuming 'metaphlan_output' is your MetaPhlAn data frame
# RPIP taxa
rpip_targets <- c(
  "Achromobacter_denitrificans",
  "Achromobacter_xylosoxidans",
  "Acinetobacter_baumannii",

  "Streptococcus_anginosus",
  "Streptococcus_constellatus",
  "Streptococcus_dysgalactiae",
  "Streptococcus_intermedius",
  "Streptococcus_mitis",
  "Streptococcus_pneumoniae",
  "Streptococcus_pyogenes",
  "Treponema_denticola",
  "Ureaplasma_urealyticum",
  "Ureaplasma_parvum",
  "Veillonella_parvula",
  "Yersinia_enterocolitica",
  "Yersinia_pestis"
)

rpip_targets = rpip_pathogen_species_list

df <- metaphlan_merged_df %>%
  filter(str_detect(clade_name, "s__")) %>% 
  mutate(rel_ab = as.numeric(relative_abundance)) %>% 
  filter(Location %in% locations) %>% 
  filter(Species %in% c(rpip_targets))  %>% 

  filter(Type %in% c("Drain", "Endcap", "H_WW")) %>% 
  mutate(
    Month = format(as.Date(Date), "%m-%Y")
  )

# Count detects per Species × Type
df_detects <- df %>%
  mutate(detect = rel_ab > 0) %>%
  group_by(Species, Type) %>%
  summarise(
    n_detects_type = sum(detect, na.rm = TRUE),   # how many samples detected?
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Total detects per species (for ordering)
detect_order <- df_detects %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarise(n_detects = sum(n_detects_type)
         #, .groups = "drop"
         ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_detects))

# compute detection + average rel_ab
df_ranks_type <- df_detects %>%
  left_join(detect_order, by = "Species") %>%

mutate(ID = rank(-n_detects_type, ties.method = "first")) %>%

  mutate(
    Species = factor(
      Species,
      levels = unique(Species[order(n_detects, -n_detects_type)])
    )
  ) %>% 

  mutate(
    TypeLabel = case_when(
      Type == "H_WW" ~ "Hospital Wastewater",
      Type == "Endcap" ~ "Sewer Biofilm",
      Type == "Drain" ~ "Sink Biofilm",
      .default = Type
    ),
    TypeLabel = factor(TypeLabel, 
                       levels = c("Hospital Wastewater", 
                                  "Sewer Biofilm", 
                                  "Sink Biofilm")),
    type_num = as.numeric(TypeLabel)
  ) %>% 

  mutate(
    Species_label = ifelse(
      str_detect(Species, "_"),
      paste0("*", str_replace_all(Species, "_", " "), "*"),
      Species
    ),
    Species_label = fct_reorder(Species_label, n_detects, .desc = FALSE)
  )

species_list = df_ranks_type %>% dplyr::select(Species_label) %>% distinct() %>% pull()

#Plot-------------

max_detect <- max(df_ranks_type$n_detects)

# candidate step
raw_step <- max_detect / 4

# function to snap to nice values (2, 5, 10, etc.)
nice_step <- function(x) {
  base <- 10^floor(log10(x))
  if (x/base <= 2) return(2 * base)
  if (x/base <= 5) return(5 * base)
  return(10 * base)
}

break_step <- 50

bars <- 
  df_ranks_type %>% 
  ggplot(aes(Species_label, -n_detects_type)) +
    geom_col(aes(fill = TypeLabel),
             size = .5,
             width = 1.02) +
    coord_flip(clip = "off") +
    scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
    scale_y_continuous(
      expand = c(.02, .02),
      limits = c(
        -max_detect - max_detect/4,
        0
      ),
      breaks = seq(
        -ceiling(max_detect / break_step) * break_step,
        0,
        by = break_step
      ),
      labels = function(x) abs(as.integer(x)),
      position = "right"
    )+
    #                       #guide = F
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#6d7ecd", "#9fdeca", "#c86c69"))+
    theme(axis.text.y.right = element_markdown(hjust = .5,size = 12),
          axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black"),
          axis.ticks.length = unit(0.5, "pt"),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 12,face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "left",
          legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
          plot.margin = margin(5, 0, 5, 5)) +
    labs(x = NULL, 
         fill = "",
         y = "Number of detections")

dots <- df_ranks_type %>% 

  ggplot(aes(Species_label, type_num, group = Species_label)) +
    geom_point(aes(Species_label, 1), color = "grey75", size = 2,show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_point(aes(Species_label, 2), color = "grey75", size = 2,show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_point(aes(Species_label, 3), color = "grey75", size = 2,show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_segment(aes(x = Species_label, xend = Species_label, 
                     y = 1, yend = 3), 
                 color = "grey75",
                 size = .3) +
    geom_line(color = "black",
              size = .9) +
    geom_point(aes(fill = TypeLabel, size = n_detects_type), 
               show.legend = FALSE,
               shape = 21, 
               color = "black", 
               stroke = 1.2) +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(.5, 7.3),
                       breaks = 1:3,
                       labels = c("Hospital Wastewater", 
                                  "Sewer Biofilm", 
                                  "Sink Biofilm"), 
                       position = "right") +
    scale_size(range = c(2, 5.5), guide = F) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#6d7ecd", "#9fdeca", "#c86c69"))+
    theme(axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", 
                                     hjust = .1, vjust = 0, angle = 35),
          axis.text.y = element_blank(),
          plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 0),
          plot.caption = element_text(face = "bold", color = "grey30", 
                                      size = 12, margin = margin(t = 15))) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL,
         caption = "")

plot = bars + dots + plot_layout(widths = c(1, .65))

showtext_opts(dpi = 300) # Synchronize showtext with ggsave

ggsave(path = "Biofilm Project Figures",file="MetaPhlAn Upset Plot Detections per Top Species.png", plot=plot, width=10, height= 5.5,dpi = 400)
ggsave(path = "Biofilm Project Figures",file="MetaPhlAn UpSet plot of pathogens detected by Species.svg", plot=plot, width=10, height=6.5)

print(plot)

```
